strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title history is Senior/Staff Software Developer, not Principal/Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership at scale

response.justification: The candidate brings broad full-stack and systems engineering experience with founder-level initiative and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the trajectory reflects senior individual contributor work rather than director-level AI platform strategy or recognized AI product leadership expected for a Principal Engineer role focused on cloud and AI differentiation.
